4.description: Michigan 211 is a statewide or regional referral resource for Michigan residents affected by the criminal justice system. Free statewide information and referral service connecting Michiganders to health and human services including housing, food, utilities, employment, and crisis support. United Way–supported navigators help callers find local programs by need and ZIP code. Michigan 211 is a referral line—not a direct-service provider. Users can search by location, service type, or need to find active providers in throughout Michigan. Specialists or online tools help match people to housing, treatment, employment, legal aid, or benefits resources operated by other organizations. This entry describes a navigation hub—staff here do not replace direct services at partner agencies.
4.description_es: Michigan 211 es un recurso de referencia estatal o regional para residentes de Michigan afectados por el sistema de justicia penal. Los usuarios pueden buscar por ubicación, tipo de servicio o necesidad para encontrar proveedores activos en en todo Michigan. Herramientas en línea o especialistas ayudan a conectar con vivienda, tratamiento, empleo, asistencia legal o beneficios operados por otras organizaciones. Esta entrada describe un centro de navegación—el personal no reemplaza servicios directos en agencias aliadas.

6.description: Legal Aid of Michigan — Statewide Intake serves justice-involved adults and families rebuilding stability after incarceration in throughout Michigan. Michigan's largest nonprofit civil legal aid provider serving low-income residents across the state with housing, public benefits, family law, consumer issues, and civil record-related matters through regional offices. Centralized intake connects callers to the appropriate local office. Does not handle criminal defense cases. Representation is limited to civil legal matters—not active criminal cases. Income, household size, and offense type determine eligibility for record relief. Contact this resource to confirm current intake steps, required documents, and whether walk-ins or referrals are accepted.
6.description_es: Legal Aid of Michigan — Statewide Intake ofrece asistencia legal civil gratuita o de bajo costo para residentes de bajos ingresos en en todo Michigan. Los abogados ayudan con sellado o eliminación de antecedentes, desalojos, beneficios y otros asuntos civiles—no casos penales activos. La representación se limita a asuntos legales civiles—no casos penales activos. Ingresos, tamaño del hogar y tipo de delito determinan la elegibilidad para alivio de antecedentes. Contacte la oficina para confirmar pasos de admisión, documentos requeridos y si aceptan visitas sin cita o referencias.
6.services: Civil legal representation|Housing legal aid|Benefits navigation|Partner referrals|Expungement assistance

66.description: Gleaners Community Food Bank of Southeastern Michigan serves justice-involved adults and families rebuilding stability after incarceration in 5 Michigan counties. Returning citizens and families can locate nearest partner pantry by ZIP code through the online food finder. Food assistance only—not cash or housing services.
